references.title: Data Security and Protection Toolkit
references.appliedTo: Reportable data-security incident handoff destination and DSPT reportability decision gating.
references.notes: The DSPT page describes the toolkit as the online self-assessment tool for organisations with access to NHS patient data and systems, and states reportable data security and protection incidents must be notified through the DSPT reporting tool.

references.title: Digital Technology Assessment Criteria (DTAC): guidance for buyers and suppliers
references.appliedTo: DTAC evidence refresh export, framework version scoping, and evidence pack refresh controls.
references.notes: The updated DTAC guidance describes DTAC as an assessment framework for digital health technologies covering clinical safety, data protection, technical security, interoperability, usability, and accessibility.

references.title: Records Management Code of Practice
references.appliedTo: Archive manifest and deletion certificate export destination, retention behavior, and legal hold fallback.
references.notes: The page identifies the code as the framework for consistent records management across NHS and adult social care, including storage, retention, and deletion.

references.title: Review of digital clinical safety standards: DCB0129 and DCB0160
references.appliedTo: DCB0129 manufacturer safety pack delta export and DCB0160 deployment handoff export.
references.notes: The page states DCB0129 defines clinical risk management requirements for manufacturers of health IT systems, while DCB0160 defines requirements for organisations that use health IT systems.

references.title: GOV.UK Design System error summary
references.appliedTo: Keyboard-reachable error summary on the export configuration form.
references.notes: Used for the pattern of a prominent error summary with links to fields that require attention.

references.title: Playwright network guide
references.appliedTo: Fake receiver route interception and redacted network payload assertions.
references.notes: Used to intercept fake receiver endpoints and verify request payloads without external delivery.

references.title: Playwright ARIA snapshot testing
references.appliedTo: Accessibility snapshot capture for the keyboard and error-summary test.
references.notes: Used for ARIA snapshot capture or fallback body text snapshots in the browser helper.
